args.query: SELECT business_ref, AVG(rating)::DOUBLE AS avg_rating, COUNT(*) AS review_cnt FROM review GROUP BY business_ref;

exec_args.sql: SELECT business_ref, AVG(rating)::DOUBLE AS avg_rating, COUNT(*) AS review_cnt FROM review GROUP BY business_ref;

result.preview: "Execution failed with exit code 1\nIndexError: single positional indexer is out-of-bounds"

args.code:
import re, json, pandas as pd

wifi_businesses = var_call_hq2UzXBV5VfkiKxVYT6YjQx3
reviews_avg = var_call_DHbyDUGDE0sBOw4vdfO7Di98

wifi_df = pd.DataFrame(wifi_businesses)
rev_df = pd.DataFrame(reviews_avg)

# extract state abbreviation from description like ' in City, ST,'
pat = re.compile(r"\b[A-Z]{2}\b")

def extract_state(desc):
    if not isinstance(desc, str):
        return None
    m = re.search(r",\s*([A-Z]{2})\b", desc)
    if m:
        return m.group(1)
    return None

wifi_df['state'] = wifi_df['description'].map(extract_state)

# keep only US states (exclude Canadian provinces like AB)
us_states = set(['AL','AK','AZ','AR','CA','CO','CT','DE','FL','GA','HI','ID','IL','IN','IA','KS','KY','LA','ME','MD','MA','MI','MN','MS','MO','MT','NE','NV','NH','NJ','NM','NY','NC','ND','OH','OK','OR','PA','RI','SC','SD','TN','TX','UT','VT','VA','WA','WV','WI','WY','DC'])
wifi_df = wifi_df[wifi_df['state'].isin(us_states)].copy()

# map businessid_x -> businessref_x
wifi_df['business_ref'] = wifi_df['business_id'].str.replace('businessid_', 'businessref_', regex=False)

rev_df['avg_rating'] = rev_df['avg_rating'].astype(float)

merged = wifi_df.merge(rev_df[['business_ref','avg_rating']], on='business_ref', how='left')

# compute count by state
state_counts = merged.groupby('state', dropna=False).size().reset_index(name='wifi_business_count')
max_row = state_counts.sort_values(['wifi_business_count','state'], ascending=[False, True]).iloc[0]
top_state = max_row['state']

# average rating across wifi businesses in that state (business-level average, ignoring businesses with no reviews)
top_state_df = merged[merged['state']==top_state]
avg_rating_state = float(top_state_df['avg_rating'].mean())

out = {
    'state': top_state,
    'wifi_business_count': int(max_row['wifi_business_count']),
    'average_rating': avg_rating_state
}

print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(out))

result.preview: {"error": "No US businesses with WiFi found in dataset after filtering."}

args.code:
import re, json, pandas as pd

wifi_businesses = var_call_hq2UzXBV5VfkiKxVYT6YjQx3
reviews_avg = var_call_DHbyDUGDE0sBOw4vdfO7Di98

wifi_df = pd.DataFrame(wifi_businesses)
rev_df = pd.DataFrame(reviews_avg)

def extract_state(desc):
    if not isinstance(desc, str):
        return None
    m = re.search(r",\s*([A-Z]{2})\b", desc)
    return m.group(1) if m else None

wifi_df['state'] = wifi_df['description'].map(extract_state)

us_states = set(['AL','AK','AZ','AR','CA','CO','CT','DE','FL','GA','HI','ID','IL','IN','IA','KS','KY','LA','ME','MD','MA','MI','MN','MS','MO','MT','NE','NV','NH','NJ','NM','NY','NC','ND','OH','OK','OR','PA','RI','SC','SD','TN','TX','UT','VT','VA','WA','WV','WI','WY','DC'])

wifi_df_us = wifi_df[wifi_df['state'].isin(us_states)].copy()

if wifi_df_us.empty:
    out = {'error':'No US businesses with WiFi found in dataset after filtering.'}
else:
    wifi_df_us['business_ref'] = wifi_df_us['business_id'].str.replace('businessid_', 'businessref_', regex=False)
    rev_df['avg_rating'] = rev_df['avg_rating'].astype(float)
    merged = wifi_df_us.merge(rev_df[['business_ref','avg_rating']], on='business_ref', how='left')

    state_counts = merged.groupby('state').size().reset_index(name='wifi_business_count')
    max_row = state_counts.sort_values(['wifi_business_count','state'], ascending=[False, True]).iloc[0]
    top_state = max_row['state']
    avg_rating_state = float(merged.loc[merged['state']==top_state, 'avg_rating'].mean())

    out = {
        'state': top_state,
        'wifi_business_count': int(max_row['wifi_business_count']),
        'average_rating': avg_rating_state
    }

print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(out))

var_call_CzGguHVORR7EsRrqDpGZoE9h.error: No US businesses with WiFi found in dataset after filtering.

val_args.code:
import re, json, pandas as pd
wifi_businesses = var_call_hq2UzXBV5VfkiKxVYT6YjQx3
wifi_df = pd.DataFrame(wifi_businesses)

def extract_state(desc):
    if not isinstance(desc, str):
        return None
    m = re.search(r",\s*([A-Z]{2})\b", desc)
    return m.group(1) if m else None

wifi_df['state'] = wifi_df['description'].map(extract_state)
print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(wifi_df['state'].value_counts(dropna=False).to_dict()))

args.code:
import re, json, pandas as pd
wifi_businesses = var_call_hq2UzXBV5VfkiKxVYT6YjQx3
reviews_avg = var_call_DHbyDUGDE0sBOw4vdfO7Di98
wifi_df = pd.DataFrame(wifi_businesses)
rev_df = pd.DataFrame(reviews_avg)

def extract_state(desc):
    if not isinstance(desc, str):
        return None
    m = re.search(r"\b([A-Z]{2}),", desc)
    return m.group(1) if m else None

wifi_df['state'] = wifi_df['description'].map(extract_state)

us_states = set(['AL','AK','AZ','AR','CA','CO','CT','DE','FL','GA','HI','ID','IL','IN','IA','KS','KY','LA','ME','MD','MA','MI','MN','MS','MO','MT','NE','NV','NH','NJ','NM','NY','NC','ND','OH','OK','OR','PA','RI','SC','SD','TN','TX','UT','VT','VA','WA','WV','WI','WY','DC'])
wifi_df_us = wifi_df[wifi_df['state'].isin(us_states)].copy()

wifi_df_us['business_ref'] = wifi_df_us['business_id'].str.replace('businessid_', 'businessref_', regex=False)
rev_df['avg_rating'] = rev_df['avg_rating'].astype(float)
merged = wifi_df_us.merge(rev_df[['business_ref','avg_rating']], on='business_ref', how='left')

state_counts = merged.groupby('state').size().reset_index(name='wifi_business_count')
max_row = state_counts.sort_values(['wifi_business_count','state'], ascending=[False, True]).iloc[0]
top_state = max_row['state']
avg_rating_state = float(merged.loc[merged['state']==top_state,'avg_rating'].mean())

out = {'state': top_state, 'wifi_business_count': int(max_row['wifi_business_count']), 'average_rating': avg_rating_state}
print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(out))

args.code:
import re, json, pandas as pd
wifi_df = pd.DataFrame(var_call_hq2UzXBV5VfkiKxVYT6YjQx3)

def extract_state(desc):
    if not isinstance(desc, str):
        return None
    m = re.search(r"\b([A-Z]{2}),", desc)
    return m.group(1) if m else None

wifi_df['state'] = wifi_df['description'].map(extract_state)
print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(wifi_df['state'].value_counts(dropna=False).to_dict()))

args.code:
import re, json, pandas as pd
wifi_df = pd.DataFrame(var_call_8A4irPZU6MtNnXysANGnmlJT)

def extract_state(desc):
    if not isinstance(desc,str):
        return None
    m = re.search(r"\b([A-Z]{2}),", desc)
    return m.group(1) if m else None

wifi_df['state']=wifi_df['description'].apply(extract_state)
print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(wifi_df['state'].value_counts(dropna=False).to_dict()))

args.code:
import re, json, pandas as pd
wifi_businesses = var_call_8A4irPZU6MtNnXysANGnmlJT
reviews_avg = var_call_DHbyDUGDE0sBOw4vdfO7Di98
wifi_df = pd.DataFrame(wifi_businesses)
rev_df = pd.DataFrame(reviews_avg)

def extract_state(desc):
    if not isinstance(desc,str):
        return None
    m = re.search(r"(?:^|[^A-Za-z0-9_])([A-Z]{2}),", desc)
    return m.group(1) if m else None

wifi_df['state'] = wifi_df['description'].apply(extract_state)

us_states = set(['AL','AK','AZ','AR','CA','CO','CT','DE','FL','GA','HI','ID','IL','IN','IA','KS','KY','LA','ME','MD','MA','MI','MN','MS','MO','MT','NE','NV','NH','NJ','NM','NY','NC','ND','OH','OK','OR','PA','RI','SC','SD','TN','TX','UT','VT','VA','WA','WV','WI','WY','DC'])
wifi_df_us = wifi_df[wifi_df['state'].isin(us_states)].copy()

wifi_df_us['business_ref'] = wifi_df_us['business_id'].str.replace('businessid_', 'businessref_', regex=False)
rev_df['avg_rating'] = rev_df['avg_rating'].astype(float)
merged = wifi_df_us.merge(rev_df[['business_ref','avg_rating']], on='business_ref', how='left')

state_counts = merged.groupby('state').size().reset_index(name='wifi_business_count')
max_row = state_counts.sort_values(['wifi_business_count','state'], ascending=[False, True]).iloc[0]
top_state = max_row['state']
avg_rating_state = float(merged.loc[merged['state']==top_state,'avg_rating'].mean())

out = {'state': top_state, 'wifi_business_count': int(max_row['wifi_business_count']), 'average_rating': avg_rating_state}
print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(out))
